classified_findings.description: The spec includes Section 23 11 23 Facility Natural-Gas Piping, but no Work Category assigns this scope to any subcontractor. There is no mechanical/plumbing WC in the bid package. Natural gas piping

The spec includes Section 32 92 00 Turf and Grasses, and WC 02 lists it as 'For Reference Only.' No Work Category formally assigns landscaping, seeding, sodding, or irrigation installation. Marking tu

No Work Category addresses dewatering during earthwork, utility installation, or foundation construction. WC 02 covers earth moving and site utilities but is silent on groundwater management. Dependin

No Work Category addresses rock excavation. WC 02 covers earth moving per Section 31 20 00, but neither the WC nor the spec section text (empty) clarifies whether rock excavation is included, excluded

The earthwork balance — whether the site is cut-heavy or fill-heavy — is not addressed in any Work Category. WC 02 covers earth moving but does not specify whether excess soil export or import fill is

WC 02 covers utility installation including sanitary sewer and water distribution, but no Work Category addresses utility connection fees, tap fees, or meter fees charged by the municipality or utilit
